title: Search Continues for Missing Woman; Car Towed Before Disappearance
summary: Kathryn Grayson Hardy was last seen in Clover on April 8. Her car was towed prior to her disappearance, according to York County deputies.
charlotte_impact: The circumstances surrounding her disappearance raise concerns and highlight the need for community awareness.

title: Man Arrested After Pregnant Wife Fatally Shoots Herself
summary: A man was arrested after his pregnant wife accidentally shot herself, killing their unborn child. The incident occurred after she took the gun from him.
charlotte_impact: This tragic incident underscores the dangers of firearms and the importance of responsible gun ownership.

title: Chesterfield County Homicide Suspect Apprehended in Monroe
summary: Reggie Ivey, 27, has been arrested in Monroe, NC, in connection to a homicide that occurred in Chesterfield County, South Carolina.
charlotte_impact: The arrest brings a step towards justice in a case that has impacted the Chesterfield County community.

title: Woman Unconscious After Brutal Bus Assault
summary: A woman was brutally beaten unconscious on a CATS bus. Police are investigating the violent assault.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about safety on public transportation and the need for increased security measures.

title: Teen Robbed at Gunpoint; Suspect Arrested
summary: A 17-year-old was robbed of $2,000 at gunpoint in southwest Charlotte. A suspect has been arrested in connection with the incident.
charlotte_impact: The quick arrest highlights law enforcement's commitment to addressing violent crime in the area.

title: Victim Airlifted After Plane Crash Near Lincoln County Airport
summary: A person was airlifted to the hospital after a plane crash near the Lincolnton-Lincoln County Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: The incident underscores the risks associated with aviation and the importance of emergency response protocols.

title: Record Heat Wave Expected in the Carolinas
summary: The Carolinas are bracing for a dry, hot spell with temperatures near 90°F, raising concerns about drought and fire risks.
charlotte_impact: The impending heat wave highlights the impact of climate change and the need for preparedness.

title: Community Voices Central in I-77 South Proposal Meeting
summary: Community and local leaders will discuss the I-77 South toll lane plans, addressing public concerns about displacement and equity.
charlotte_impact: Community input is crucial for shaping infrastructure projects that impact residents' lives.

title: School Bus Driver Hospitalized After Crash
summary: A school bus driver was hospitalized with minor injuries after crashing into a tree in south Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The incident serves as a reminder of the importance of safe driving practices, especially for school vehicles.

title: Charlotte SHOUT! Boosts Local Businesses
summary: Charlotte SHOUT! is providing exposure and connections for small businesses, helping them grow their brand awareness.
charlotte_impact: Community events like SHOUT! play a vital role in supporting the local economy and fostering a sense of community.

title: Residents React to Birkdale Village Gun Threat
summary: Huntersville residents express their concerns following a gun threat at Birkdale Village, a popular shopping destination.
charlotte_impact: The incident highlights the need for vigilance and security measures in public spaces.

title: Ty Gibbs Victorious at Bristol
summary: Ty Gibbs secured his first NASCAR Cup Series victory, holding off Blaney in a thrilling side-by-side battle at Bristol.
charlotte_impact: Gibbs' victory marks a significant milestone in his career and adds excitement to the NASCAR season.

title: Potent New Drug Surfaces in South Carolina
summary: A drug up to 40 times stronger than fentanyl, called Cychlorphine, may have surfaced in South Carolina, posing a significant public health threat.
charlotte_impact: The emergence of this drug underscores the ongoing opioid crisis and the need for advanced detection methods.

title: Cause Determined in West Charlotte House Fire
summary: Firefighters have determined the cause of a house fire in west Charlotte, which was quickly subdued by 30 firefighters.
charlotte_impact: Prompt response by firefighters prevented further damage and potential injuries.

title: Arrest Made After Gun Threat at Birkdale Village
summary: An arrest has been made following a gun threat at Birkdale Village, where people were shopping on Saturday night.
charlotte_impact: The arrest provides reassurance to the community and demonstrates law enforcement's response to threats.
